value.body: Su-vastika designs and manufactures advanced power backup systems, lithium battery solutions, energy storage technologies and solar inverters. The company holds more than 25+ patents in clean energy innovation, with a focus on reliable, efficient, and sustainable power solutions.
value.headline: Engineering the Future of Energy

value.eyebrow: BESS · Lithium Inverter/UPS · Lift Inverter · Backup
value.headline:
Take the diesel generator
out of the building.
value.subheadline: Silent, fuel-free lithium power backup & energy storage — proven in India's first all-lithium hotel, factories, homes and high-rise lifts.
